# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] test (new/updated tests)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)

## What Was Updated

- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Business logic
- [ ] API route(s)
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/config

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`

## Screenshots / Demo (if UI changed)

Add before/after screenshots or a short GIF.

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I kept changes scoped to the task
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs where relevant
- [ ] I linked related issue(s)

## Related Issues

Closes #issue-number
